title: Cursor Anchor
description: Remembers position of cursor when opening inventory or storagecontainer, instead of resetting it, to middle of screen.
body:
# Cursor Anchor
### When opening inventory
or **storagecontainers**, the position of the cursor is usually set to the middle of the screen.

With this Fabric mod, the **last cursor position is remembered**, to set the cursor position when opening inventory or storagecontainers again.  

Use command ```/caconfig``` to open Config Screen. Choose which inventorys should remember cursor position. Also accessible via Mod Menu.

![Config Screen to choose which inventory should remember cursor position](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xzgu8wGs/images/ab7775f0a29b3bd4c255b9f9fa4ed693e81ead7c.png)


<details>
<summary>Supported Inventorys</summary>

- beacon
- brewingstand
- cartographytable
- crafter
- craftingtable
- enchantmenttable
- forging (share same remembered cursor position)
  - anvil
  - smithingtable
- generic3x3container (share same remembered cursor position)
  - dropper
  - dispencer
- genericcontainer (share same remembered cursor position)
  - chest
  - redstonechest
  - barrel
  - enderchest
- grindstone
- hopper
- horse
- loom
- merchant (share same remembered cursor position)
  - wandering trader
  - villiager
- shulkerbox
- stonecutter

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dependencies</summary>
  
- Fabric-Api

</details>

<details>
<summary>Special Thanks to</summary>
  
- TheHanfried

</details>
